name: TruePeopleSearch
description: Free US people-search aggregator (no signup) that pulls current/past addresses, phone numbers, relatives and associates.
bestFor: Free US people search returning addresses, phones, relatives, and associates from a name, phone, or address.
notes: Frequently the highest-yield free US people-search for missing persons; surfaces relatives/associates to expand a network.

name: FastPeopleSearch
description: Free US people-search aggregator similar to TruePeopleSearch with relatives and address history.
bestFor: Free US people search by name, phone or address; lists relatives and prior addresses.

name: Facebook Search (IntelTechniques method)
description: A set of structured Facebook search queries that pivot a profile into friends, photos, places, check-ins, employment and more.
bestFor: Structured Facebook graph-search queries (friends, photos, check-ins, employment, etc.) built from a profile ID.
notes: Generates dozens of targeted queries (Timeline, Friends, Photos, Check-ins, Employment, Relationships, etc.) against facebook.com from a numeric profile ID. Highly valuable for mapping a missing person's network and last-known locations. Requires a logged-in session for many queries.

name: X (Twitter) Search (IntelTechniques method)
description: Structured X/Twitter search queries and mirror access (XCancel, memory.lol, Wayback) to recover a user's tweets, media and connections.
bestFor: Advanced X/Twitter search queries (outgoing/incoming tweets, media, followers, by-year) plus Nitter/XCancel and archive mirrors.
